title: MGN 583 (F) Amendment 2 ILO Work in fishing convention - fishermen's work agreements
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention) Regulations 2018 and replaces MGN 583 (F) Amendment 1.  Amendment 2 updates references only.  Notice to   fishing vessel owners operators and managers employers of fishermen skippers officers and fishermen on fishing vessels.   Annex’s A and B attached separately provide model formats for a fishermen’s work agreement. "
